summary: Adjusted Chapter 4's opening to a distinct action-first entry point so it no longer mirrors Chapter 5's time-led weather scaffold, while preserving all original narrative information, tone, and beats.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with Elsie's immediate window action and latch-listening instead of a time-first construction.
Retained the same opening facts (Tom still missing, late-morning escalation, sideways snow, lane isolation) with no causality or character-voice changes.
Left the chapter ending unchanged after seam check because its dawn search split already hands off cleanly into the next chapter's later-time opening.
